poa_effectiveness.author: Reviewing Attorney
poa_effectiveness.basis: principal wants the agent able to act immediately on execution; durable so it survives later incapacity

specific_authority_grants:
(a) make gifts of my property, subject to the limitations of 18-C M.R.S. § 5-947, to my spouse and descendants in amounts not exceeding the annual federal gift-tax exclusion per recipient per year; and
(b) create or change a beneficiary designation on my retirement accounts.
